name: Electrify
descrip: Use magic to send light electric currents across your target's body. Can stun.
outcome: [AttackerName] caresses [TargetName]'s body with [AttackerHisOrHer] hands while sending bits of magical electricity across them, forcing them to cry out in pleasurable pain.
miss: [AttackerName] caresses [TargetName]'s body with [AttackerHisOrHer] hands while sending bits of magical electricity across them, but [TargetName] seems completely unaffected!
statusOutcome: The magic leaves [TargetName] senselessly incoherent! [TargetName] is stunned!
